summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the AppleTV+ game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN "Stream on: APPLE TV+" is displayed above "Broadcast Networks" at the bottom of the game tile

And the user should see a Locked badge and a Blackout badge in the upper left corner of the game tile - [COW-1491|https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/COW-1491]
